% INSR Scientific Publishing Platform v4.0 project configuration.
% Switch document type/output in config/active-target.tex; do not edit main.tex.
\InputIfFileExists{config/active-target.tex}{}{%
  \INSRBootstrap{document/type=position-paper, output/target=paper}%
}
\INSRConfigure{
  document/density = standard,
  document/build-profile = development,
  design/theme = research,
  design/palette = midnight,
  design/font = noto,
  % Midnight is a dark palette. The mode drives contrast-safe semantic roles
  % for headings, contents, headers, footers and presentation text.
  design/mode = dark,
  accessibility/high-contrast = false,
  localization/language = english,
  localization/direction = ltr,
  bibliography/resource = {},
  content/template = auto,
  content/source = auto,
  content/placeholders = compact
}
\InputIfFileExists{config/metadata-config.tex}{}{}
\InputIfFileExists{config/publication-config.tex}{}{}
\InputIfFileExists{config/layout-config.tex}{}{}
\InputIfFileExists{config/authors-config.tex}{}{}
